subject: Got the smaller of my two discounts on this month's invoice
description:
I have two active codes on my account, SAVE10 and FLAT5. This month's order came to $120.00 and the invoice only took $5.00 off. Your pricing page says the best discount is applied automatically, and 10% of $120 is obviously more than $5.

Also, not sure if it's related, but the amounts on my last couple of invoices look formatted differently than before - did you change how totals are displayed? Maybe something went sideways in that change.

Can you refund the difference and check my account?

subject: Wrong coupon used at checkout
description:
I signed up last week and got WELCOME15. My first order was $80 but I was charged $72, which looks like the old SAVE10 code my account also has was used instead of the 15% one. Expected $68.

Small amount but I'd like the credit, and you might want to check whether this is happening to other new customers too.
